titleStmt.title: SII 9.622: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 622. (A.R. No. 106 of 1904.) ON A SLAB SET UP AT THE ENTRANCE TO THE VIRABHADRA TEMPLE AT BAGALI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1468, Plavaṅga, Jyēshṭha, śu. 11, Budhavāra. In the cyclic year Plavaṅga corresponding to Śaka 1469 expired, the details cited give the equivalent A.D. 1547 May 30 Monday, not Wednesday. The inscription refers itself to the reign of Sadāśiva-Mahārāya ruling at Vidyānagara and records that Timmōja, Koṇḍōja, Bhadrōja and other barbers in the service of the crown were exempted from kāṇike, kaḍḍāya, biṭṭi, birāḍa and other taxes. It also registers a similar exemption granted to the barbers of Bāguḷi in Koṭṭūra-sīme.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrī
jayādbhudayaśāli
vāhanaśakavaruṣa
sā 1468 plavaṁga saṁva
chyarada jyēṣṭa śu 11 bu lu
śrīmanmahārājadhirā
ja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapra
tāpa sadāśivamahārāya
ru vidyānagaradalu ratnasiṁhāsa
nāṟūḍharāgi pṛthvīrājyaṁ
geyyuttamiralu tiṁmōjakoṁ
ḍōja bhadrōja muṁtāda rājani
yōgada nāyiṁdarige kāṇike ka
ḍāya biṭi birāḍa koṭaṇa Ēnū
yillā Eṁdu hēḷi koṭṭa sarva
mā(ṁ)nyada śāsana koṭūra sī
meyoḷagaṇa bāguḷiya nāyiṁ
darige kāṇike kaḍāya biṭi koṭaṇa
ba teṟe liṁgadeṟe Ēnū yilā
Eṁdu koṭa sarvamānyaśāsana .
yidake Āru tappidavarige katte tuṁṇi ka
ḷamoge nāyida ra
makkaḷu .
Digital edition of SII 9.622 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
